name: Oatmeal Banana Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the butter and sugar. Beat until creamy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the mashed bananas and honey until well combined.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, oats, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring just until moistened.
6. Fill paper-lined muffin cups two-thirds full with batter.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 18-20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a cupcake comes out clean.
8. Allow cupcakes to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Yield: 1 1/2 dozen
